seo_title: Trump Mobile's Patriotic Credentials Under Fire Over American Flag…
meta_description: The Trump phone's design has sparked controversy over its patriotic credentials, with the company's logo featuring an American flag with only 11 stripes.
body_html:
Does Trump Mobile know how many stripes are on the American flag? The company's logo features an American flag with only 11 stripes, sparking controversy over its patriotic credentials.

Design Flaws and ControversyThe Trump phone's design has been criticized for featuring an American flag with only 11 stripes, instead of the traditional 13.This error has sparked debate over the company's patriotic credentials, particularly under a president who wants to criminalize flag-burning.Logo Evolution and Design ChangesDateLogo VersionFebruaryGiant T1 logo with 13 stripesCurrent ReleaseTrump Mobile logo with 11 stripesDesign and Manufacturing IssuesThe Trump phone's design has been criticized for its uneven camera lens spacing, gold finish, and resemblance to a two-year-old HTC phone.

source.title: Does Trump Mobile know how many stripes are on the American flag?
source.summary: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. This week, despite our best hopes, we still don't have our phone - but we do have some fresh doubts about the company's patriotic credentials. This has been a momentous […]
